bird.name: Montezuma oropendola
bird.summary: The Montezuma oropendola (Psarocolius montezuma) is a New World tropical icterid bird. It is a resident breeder in the Caribbean coastal lo…

locations.name: 哥斯达黎加
locations.summary: 哥斯达黎加共和國（西班牙語：República de Costa Rica），通稱哥斯达黎加（Costa Rica），是中美洲国家，北邻尼加拉瓜，南与巴拿马接壤，首都為聖荷西。 哥斯达黎加是当今世界上第一个裁撤军队的国家。目前哥斯大黎加是…

relations.subject: Montezuma oropendola
relations.evidence: PDF fulltext Outside the breeding season, this species is quite mobile, with some seasonal movements.thumb|left|300px|Hanging nests in farmland near Quesada, Costa Rica|Quesada, [[Costa Rica]] thumb|right|On a British Honduras stamp.The Montezuma oropendola inhabits forest canopy, edges and old plantations
